title: 12 x Money Box Seterling Tin, Savings Tin, Piggy Bank, Save for Birthday, Sterling Money Tins, 15 x 10 x 10 cm, (Mixed Set of 12)
features: Unique Design: Set of 12 tin money boxes with a British Pound note design, perfect as savings tins or novelty gifts.
Dimensions: Each tin measures 15 x 10 x 10 cm (5.9 x 9 x 9 inches), providing ample space for storing coins and notes.
Durable Construction: Made from sturdy tin material, ensuring long-lasting use and protection for your savings.
Care instructions: Wipe with a clean cloth.
Instructions Money is insurted via the slit on the tin and saved securely.
Multiple Used: Save up for Birthday Presents, Holiday, Special Occassions, Gifts, Savings, Christmas Gifts and More.
description: Introducing the ultimate money-saving solution - the MONEY BOX Tin! This set of 12 sturdy and stylish tins will help you cultivate the habit of saving, one coin at a time. Crafted from high-quality materials, each tin measures 15 x 10 x 10 cm (approximately 6 x 4 x 4 inches), providing ample space to stash your spare change. With their sleek and minimalist design, these tins blend seamlessly into any decor, making them a practical and attractive addition to your home or office. Encourage financial responsibility and watch your savings grow with the MONEY BOX Tin set. Supplied by the trusted MONEY BOX brand, these tins are not just containers but a symbol of your commitment to a financially secure future. Start your journey towards financial freedom today!
